subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! The servant who standeth present hath come with a leaf wherein thy name was inscribed among the names of them that have believed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک بهائی و عنایتی قد حضر العبد الحاضر بورقه کان فیها اسمک اسماء الذین آمنوا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
